    "Click-type torque wrench used upside down, which can alter the pivot point and applied force vector.",
    "Torque wrench is uncalibrated, violating quality gate requirements and standard work instructions."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the fastening operation immediately.",
    "Tag the affected fasteners and assemblies for rework.",
    "Obtain a calibrated torque wrench and verify its calibration record.",
    "Loosen the affected fasteners and retorque them to the engineering specification using correct technique."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using an uncalibrated torque wrench and applying force incorrectly (upside down) invalidates the torque reading, risking under-torque or over-torque of critical fasteners. This violates standard work and OEM/engineering specifications, requiring immediate stoppage and rework.",

    "OEM/engineering specs",
    "ISO 6789 (Assembly tools for screws and nuts - Hand torque tools)"
  ]
